query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `15_kommo_tokens` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `accessToken` text NOT NULL,
  `refreshToken` text NOT NULL,
  `tokenType` varchar(50) DEFAULT 'Bearer',
  `expiresAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  `baseDomain` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `16_kommo_leads` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `kommoLeadId` int NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `nome` varchar(300),
  `telefone` varchar(30),
  `status` varchar(100) DEFAULT 'novo',
  `pipeline` varchar(100),
  `origemCanal` varchar(100),
  `tipoServico` varchar(100),
  `placa` varchar(15),
  `marca` varchar(100),
  `modelo` varchar(200),
  `temperatura` varchar(20) DEFAULT 'morno',
  `clienteId` int,
  `agendamentoId` int,
  `ultimaMensagem` text,
  `ultimaInteracao` timestamp NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
